lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: I choose Salvation. I wish to be the Master's blade, striking evil, upholding virtue, and offering salvation to those in peril.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier
The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: You are a false Divinity... Gehinnom will reveal the truth.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: I will never forget my cause.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: If Divinity takes up arms against the innocent, I will raise my sword against Divinity!
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: With the support and hope of countless souls, I stand before you.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: They fell, so I may rise!
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Someone must expose your lies. As long as there is a sliver of hope, I will not give up.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier
The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier
The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier
The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier
